rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.description: A corroded blade from Valdris's armory. The kingdom's last defenders fell with these.

iron_blade.name: Iron Blade
iron_blade.description: Standard-issue sword of the King's Guard. Sir Aldric's company carried these.

rusty_dagger.name: Rusty Dagger
rusty_dagger.description: A small blade favored by Valdris's thieves' guild. Quick and silent.

shadow_dagger.name: Shadow Dagger
shadow_dagger.description: Forged by the assassin's guild of Valdris. They say it was used to open the gates.

wooden_staff.name: Wooden Staff
wooden_staff.description: A gnarled staff from the mages of Valdris. Faint energy still hums within.

arcane_staff.name: Arcane Staff
arcane_staff.description: Crystals from the arcane wells beneath Valdris. They pulse with power.

battle_axe.name: Battle Axe
battle_axe.description: A heavy axe wielded by Valdris's vanguard. It cleaves through armor and bone.

war_hammer.name: War Hammer
war_hammer.description: Forged for the siege of the northern wall. It crushes steel and hope alike.

holy_sword.name: Holy Sword
holy_sword.description: Blessed by the temple of Valdris. The light is fading -- the god has turned away.

flame_tongue.name: Flame Tongue
flame_tongue.description: Forged in dragonfire. Its edge burns eternally. The dragon shed this metal when it grew.

dragon_slayer.name: Dragon Slayer
dragon_slayer.description: A massive sword forged to slay Kael'thrax. The previous wielder failed. You see their bones nearby.

wand_of_frost.name: Wand of Frost
wand_of_frost.description: Ice crystals from the frozen depths of Valdris. Freezes on contact. Cold to the touch.

rusty_axe.name: Rusty Axe
rusty_axe.description: A battered woodcutter's axe. It has seen better days. So have you.

berserker_axe.name: Berserker Axe
berserker_axe.description: A wild blade that rewards fury over form. The wielder bleeds, but so does everything else.

executioners_axe.name: Executioner's Axe
executioners_axe.description: The royal executioner's tool. It only needs to fall once.

world_ender.name: World Ender
world_ender.description: A colossal axe forged from meteorite iron. The ground trembles when it falls.

storm_cleaver.name: Storm Cleaver
storm_cleaver.description: Lightning courses through its edge. It strikes as fast as thunder.

doom_cleaver.name: Doom Cleaver
doom_cleaver.description: Every kingdom it has touched has fallen. You are next. Or your enemies are.

venom_fang.name: Venom Fang
venom_fang.description: Coated in the venom of a dungeon serpent. It bites twice -- once with steel, once with poison.

swift_blade.name: Swift Blade
swift_blade.description: A whisper of steel. You barely feel it in your hand. Neither do they.

assassins_kris.name: Assassin's Kris
assassins_kris.description: The weapon of choice for Valdris's kill squad. It always finds the gap.

shadow_reaper.name: Shadow Reaper
shadow_reaper.description: Forged in the Shadow Realm. It drinks what it spills.

zephyr_edge.name: Zephyr Edge
zephyr_edge.description: A blade made of wind and spite. It cuts through the air and everything in it.

voidfang.name: Voidfang
voidfang.description: It drinks light. It drinks life. It drinks everything. It is never full.

staff_of_thunder.name: Staff of Thunder
staff_of_thunder.description: Storm clouds gather when you raise it. The air crackles with potential.

crystal_scepter.name: Crystal Scepter
crystal_scepter.description: Pure crystallized mana shaped into a focus. It hums with infinite possibility.

staff_of_the_archmage.name: Staff of the Archmage
staff_of_the_archmage.description: The last Archmage's focus. Her power still lingers in the crystal.

ethereal_wand.name: Ethereal Wand
ethereal_wand.description: It phases between dimensions. The magic is not of this world.

staff_of_oblivion.name: Staff of Oblivion
staff_of_oblivion.description: It does not destroy. It erases. What it touches ceases to have existed.

blessed_mace.name: Blessed Mace
blessed_mace.description: A simple mace blessed by the temple priests. The light is faint, but it is there.

divine_hammer.name: Divine Hammer
divine_hammer.description: Forged in the sacred fires of the temple. It carries the weight of faith.

radiant_blade.name: Radiant Blade
radiant_blade.description: A blade that glows with inner light. It does not cut -- it purifies.

crusaders_edge.name: Crusader's Edge
crusaders_edge.description: The weapon of the Holy Crusade. It has cleansed a thousand unholy things.

judgments_hammer.name: Judgment's Hammer
judgments_hammer.description: When it falls, the verdict is final. No appeal. No mercy.

paladins_oath.name: Paladin's Oath
paladins_oath.description: An oath made manifest. It will not break. Neither will you.

aegis_lightbringer.name: Aegis Lightbringer
aegis_lightbringer.description: The weapon of the First Paladin. It brought light to the darkest age.

knights_blade.name: Knight's Blade
knights_blade.description: A well-balanced sword from the knightly orders of Valdris. Reliable in any hand.

steel_longsword.name: Steel Longsword
steel_longsword.description: Tempered steel from the forges beneath the castle. It holds an edge forever.

void_blade.name: Void Blade
void_blade.description: A sword that cuts through reality itself. The void stares back from its edge.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Light leather from Valdris's hunters. Doesn't slow you down.

chainmail.name: Chainmail
chainmail.description: Valdris infantry armor. The links are worn thin from decades of use.

plate_armor.name: Plate Armor
plate_armor.description: Royal guard plate. Only the king's personal protectors wore this. It still bears his crest.

shadow_cloak.name: Shadow Cloak
shadow_cloak.description: Woven by the assassins of Valdris. It moves like a living shadow.

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale Shield
dragon_scale.description: Forged from Kael'thrax's own scales. The dragon shed them when it grew. Nearly unbreakable.

robes_of_arcana.name: Robes of Arcana
robes_of_arcana.description: Worn by the court mages of Valdris. They amplify spell power at a cost.

iron_vest.name: Iron Vest
iron_vest.description: A crude iron vest hammered into shape. It will stop a blade. Maybe two.

warriors_lamellar.name: Warrior's Lamellar
warriors_lamellar.description: Lamellar armor favored by Valdris's front-line fighters. Light enough to fight in.

reinforced_mail.name: Reinforced Mail
reinforced_mail.description: Chainmail reinforced with steel plates. The best of both worlds.

wardens_plate.name: Warden's Plate
wardens_plate.description: Worn by the wardens of Valdris's prison. They never let anyone through.

titan_plate.name: Titan Plate
titan_plate.description: Forged from titan bone. The wearer becomes a walking fortress.

aegis_of_the_fallen.name: Aegis of the Fallen
aegis_of_the_fallen.description: Carried by every king who fell defending Valdris. Their will remains.

assassins_garb.name: Assassin's Garb
assassins_garb.description: Tailored for silence and speed. The wearer becomes a whisper.

windwalker_wraps.name: Windwalker Wraps
windwalker_wraps.description: Silk wraps that channel wind currents. You barely touch the ground.

phantom_vestments.name: Phantom Vestments
phantom_vestments.description: Woven from phantom silk. It phases between dimensions as you move.

nightstalkers_shroud.name: Nightstalker's Shroud
nightstalkers_shroud.description: A cloak of living shadow. It drinks the darkness and gives it back.

shadowdance_raiment.name: Shadowdance Raiment
shadowdance_raiment.description: The assassin's ultimate garment. You become the shadow itself.

cloak_of_the_unseen.name: Cloak of the Unseen
cloak_of_the_unseen.description: It does not hide you. It un-makes you. You were never here.

apprentice_robes.name: Apprentice Robes
apprentice_robes.description: Simple robes worn by mages-in-training. The power is in the wearer, not the cloth.

mages_raiment.name: Mage's Raiment
mages_raiment.description: Robes woven with mana threads. They hum with arcane potential.

archmages_regalia.name: Archmage's Regalia
archmages_regalia.description: The ceremonial robes of the Archmage. Power radiates from every thread.

mantle_of_the_primordial.name: Mantle of the Primordial
mantle_of_the_primordial.description: Woven from the first magic ever cast. It remembers everything.

cosmosweave_vestments.name: Cosmosweave Vestments
cosmosweave_vestments.description: Threads of starlight woven into cloth. The universe whispers its secrets.

holy_vestments.name: Holy Vestments
holy_vestments.description: Simple vestments blessed by the temple. The light is faint, but it warms you.

blessed_mail.name: Blessed Mail
blessed_mail.description: Chainmail blessed by the high priest. It turns aside both blade and dark magic.

crusaders_plate.name: Crusader's Plate
crusaders_plate.description: Worn by the Holy Crusade. It protects the faithful and breaks the unholy.

templar_guard.name: Templar Guard
templar_guard.description: The Templar Order's finest armor. It has never been breached by mortal hand.

aegis_of_light.name: Aegis of Light
aegis_of_light.description: A shield-armor forged from divine light. It burns the unholy on contact.

divine_bulwark.name: Divine Bulwark
divine_bulwark.description: The armor of a god's chosen. It does not just protect -- it punishes.

iron_plate.name: Iron Plate
iron_plate.description: Solid iron plate armor. Heavy, but it will keep you alive.

light_brigandine.name: Light Brigandine
light_brigandine.description: Armor plates sewn into leather. Light and mobile.

steel_plate.name: Steel Plate
steel_plate.description: Tempered steel plate. The standard for those who walk into danger.

titanium_guard.name: Titanium Guard
titanium_guard.description: Lighter than steel, stronger than iron. The future of armor.

adamant_aegis.name: Adamant Aegis
adamant_aegis.description: Forged from adamantine. Nothing has ever cracked it. Nothing ever will.

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.description: Valdris alchemists once perfected healing draughts. This is all that remains.

greater_health_potion.name: Greater Health Potion
greater_health_potion.description: A potent elixir from the royal apothecary. The recipe died with the kingdom.

superior_health_potion.name: Superior Health Potion
superior_health_potion.description: An exceedingly rare healing draught. The last bottle in all of Valdris.

mana_crystal.name: Mana Crystal
mana_crystal.description: Crystallized mana from the arcane wells beneath Valdris. It hums with power.

superior_mana_crystal.name: Superior Mana Crystal
superior_mana_crystal.description: A dense shard of pure mana. The mages of Valdris would kill for this.

full_restore.name: Full Restore
full_restore.description: The rarest elixir of Valdris. It restores everything. But it cannot restore what is lost.

strength_elixir.name: Strength Elixir
strength_elixir.description: Brewed for Valdris's champions. It surges through your veins.

iron_skin_potion.name: Iron Skin Potion
iron_skin_potion.description: Hardens the skin like steel. The royal guard drank this before battle.

swift_potion.name: Swift Potion
swift_potion.description: Brewed from the tendons of a wyvern. Time seems to slow around you.

precision_tincture.name: Precision Tincture
precision_tincture.description: Sharpens the senses to a razor's edge. The assassin's tool of choice.

antidote.name: Antidote
antidote.description: Purges toxins and curses from the body. Distilled from dungeon herbs.

fire_resist_potion.name: Fire Resist Potion
fire_resist_potion.description: Coats the skin in a heat-resistant film. Smells of sulfur and ash.

ice_resist_potion.name: Ice Resist Potion
ice_resist_potion.description: A shimmering blue draught that numbs the senses to cold. From the frost caves.

lightning_resist_potion.name: Lightning Resist Potion
lightning_resist_potion.description: Crackles faintly when shaken. Grounds electrical energy on contact.

red_mushroom.name: Red Mushroom
red_mushroom.description: A crimson cap fungus from the dungeon depths. Tastes faintly of iron.

blue_mushroom.name: Blue Mushroom
blue_mushroom.description: A luminescent blue mushroom. It hums with arcane energy.

purple_mushroom.name: Purple Mushroom
purple_mushroom.description: A deep violet mushroom that restores both body and mind.

brown_mushroom.name: Brown Mushroom
brown_mushroom.description: A plain brown cap. Edible, barely. Better than nothing.

rainbow_mushroom.name: Rainbow Mushroom
rainbow_mushroom.description: An iridescent cap that shifts colors. Its effect is... unpredictable.

silver_key.name: Silver Key
silver_key.description: A tarnished silver key from Valdris's treasury. Opens silver locks.

gold_key.name: Gold Key
gold_key.description: An ornate golden key. It opens the royal vault. The vault that held the Grail.

chest_key.name: Chest Key
chest_key.description: A sturdy iron key. Opens any sealed chest found in the dungeon.

ring_of_shadows.name: Ring of Shadows
ring_of_shadows.description: A dark ring worn by Valdris's master assassin. It whispers power to the stealthy.

holy_grail.name: Holy Grail
holy_grail.description: The Grail of Wishes. It promises everything. It takes everything.

berserker_belt.name: Berserker Belt
berserker_belt.description: Worn by Valdris's berserkers. Rage courses through you. More attack, less defense.

amulet_of_fortitude.name: Amulet of Fortitude
amulet_of_fortitude.description: An ancient amulet from the temples of Valdris. It bolsters vitality.

thief_cloak.name: Thief's Cloak
thief_cloak.description: Worn by the rogues of Valdris. Makes you harder to hit. They never died clean.

arcane_crystal.name: Arcane Crystal
arcane_crystal.description: Pulses with raw magical energy from the arcane wells. The mages died trying to contain it.

cartographers_eye.name: Cartographer's Eye
cartographers_eye.description: An ancient eye that reveals the dungeon's full layout. The map seers of Valdris wore these.

warlords_crest.name: Warlord's Crest
warlords_crest.description: The crest of Valdris's warlords. It demands strength and rewards it.

crown_of_conquest.name: Crown of Conquest
crown_of_conquest.description: Worn by those who conquered nations. It weighs nothing. It weighs everything.

shadow_band.name: Shadow Band
shadow_band.description: A ring of solidified shadow. It hums with lethal potential.

assassins_signet.name: Assassin's Signet
assassins_signet.description: The mark of the guild master. Every contract was fulfilled. Every target fell.

void_ring.name: Void Ring
void_ring.description: A ring of pure void. It takes what it needs. It always needs more.

mana_shard.name: Mana Shard
mana_shard.description: A shard of crystallized mana. It amplifies spell power and precision.

orb_of_the_nexus.name: Orb of the Nexus
orb_of_the_nexus.description: A crystal orb that channels the nexus of all magical energy. The archmage's tool.

eye_of_the_void.name: Eye of the Void
eye_of_the_void.description: An eye torn from a void creature. It sees everything. It knows everything.

holy_symbol.name: Holy Symbol
holy_symbol.description: A sacred symbol that bolsters body and spirit. The faithful are rewarded.

paladins_seal.name: Paladin's Seal
paladins_seal.description: The seal of the paladin order. It grants power to those who serve the light.

divine_crown.name: Divine Crown
divine_crown.description: A crown blessed by the gods. It makes the wearer a beacon of divine power.

avatars_blessing.name: Avatar's Blessing
avatars_blessing.description: The blessing of the avatar incarnate. You become more than mortal.

ring_of_power.name: Ring of Power
ring_of_power.description: A simple ring that bolsters both offense and defense. Universal and reliable.

crown_of_the_conqueror.name: Crown of the Conqueror
crown_of_the_conqueror.description: Worn by those who subjugated nations. It grants dominion over all.

orb_of_eternity.name: Orb of Eternity
orb_of_eternity.description: An orb that contains a universe. It grants power beyond comprehension.

tin_amulet.name: Tin Amulet
tin_amulet.description: A plain amulet. Nothing special, but it keeps you alive.
tin_amulet.lore: Mass-produced in the foundries of Valdris's lower quarter. The workers wore three each.

copper_ring.name: Copper Ring
copper_ring.description: Faint mana hums within the cheap metal.
copper_ring.lore: The first thing apprentice mages learn to enchant. Most of them die before they finish.

wooden_charm.name: Wooden Charm
wooden_charm.description: Carved from a tree that never dies.
wooden_charm.lore: The World Tree's last branch. The druids of Valdris carved it into a thousand charms.

rusty_locket.name: Rusty Locket
rusty_locket.description: Its previous owner fought well enough to die.
rusty_locket.lore: Found on a skeleton in the eastern corridors. The locket held a portrait of someone forgotten.

leather_strap.name: Leather Strap
leather_strap.lore: Cut from the hide of a dungeon beast. Even its leather is tougher than steel.

feather_pendant.name: Feather Pendant
feather_pendant.description: Light as air. You move quicker wearing it.
feather_pendant.lore: A feather from a griffin that once served the kingdom's aerial cavalry.

dull_shard.name: Dull Shard
dull_shard.description: A fragment of something once powerful.
dull_shard.lore: It was whole once. Something broke it. Something very old and very angry.

withered_talisman.name: Withered Talisman
withered_talisman.description: It pulses with a sickly warmth.
withered_talisman.lore: A healer's charm that absorbed too much sickness. The sickness learned to fight back.

iron_amulet.name: Iron Amulet
iron_amulet.description: Forged in the smithies of Valdris.
iron_amulet.lore: The royal smiths made these for every soldier. Most soldiers did not survive to wear them long.

silver_ring.name: Silver Ring
silver_ring.lore: The runes are in a language older than Valdris. No one living can read them.

jade_charm.name: Jade Charm
jade_charm.description: A druid blessed this stone long ago.
jade_charm.lore: The druid who blessed it is long dead. The stone remembers his voice.

bronze_locket.name: Bronze Locket
bronze_locket.description: Etched with a war cry from a dead age.
bronze_locket.lore: The war cry of the First King. Speak it aloud and feel strength return.

steel_buckle.name: Steel Buckle
steel_buckle.lore: From the belt of Sir Kaelan's lieutenant. He died holding the western gate.

hawk_feather.name: Hawk Feather
hawk_feather.description: From a hawk that outlived three hunters.
hawk_feather.lore: The hunters all died in these dungeons. The hawk still circles above.

glowing_shard.name: Glowing Shard
glowing_shard.description: It hums when danger is near.
glowing_shard.lore: A fragment of the Grail's prison. It senses dark things. It is never wrong.

blood_pact_ring.name: Blood Pact Ring
blood_pact_ring.lore: Forged in dragon's blood. It grants the power of the beast. The beast takes its share.

gold_amulet.name: Gold Amulet
gold_amulet.description: Melted down from a king's ransom.
gold_amulet.lore: The gold was looted from the treasury the night the city fell. It still smells of smoke.

sapphire_ring.name: Sapphire Ring
sapphire_ring.description: Cool to the touch. Focuses the mind.
sapphire_ring.lore: From the crown of the last Archmage. She wore it when she sealed the darkness. She did not survive.

emerald_charm.name: Emerald Charm
emerald_charm.description: Drains life from the living to feed the wearer.
emerald_charm.lore: The emerald weeps when worn. It is not the stone that weeps.

knights_locket.name: Knight's Locket
knights_locket.description: Sir Kaelan wore this before the betrayal.
knights_locket.lore: He removed it before opening the gates. He wanted to remember what he was sacrificing.

guardians_buckle.name: Guardian's Buckle
guardians_buckle.description: Punishes those who strike the wearer.
guardians_buckle.lore: The Guardian of the Gate wore this. Every blade that struck him broke. Some attackers did not.

phoenix_feather.name: Phoenix Feather
phoenix_feather.description: Burns once, then reforms. Never dies.
phoenix_feather.lore: The phoenixes of Valdris went extinct when the dragon came. This feather is all that remains.

sharp_crystal.name: Sharp Crystal
sharp_crystal.lore: A shard of crystallized mana. The edges exist in more than one dimension.

greed_charm_rare.name: Greed Charm
greed_charm_rare.description: Coins seem to find their way to you.
greed_charm_rare.lore: The merchants of Valdris wore these. They died wealthy. They died alone.

chains_of_binding.name: Chains of Binding
chains_of_binding.description: Unbreakable chains. They bind the wearer too.
chains_of_binding.lore: Forged to imprison a demon. The demon escaped. The chains stayed. They always stay.

dragon_amulet.name: Dragon Amulet
dragon_amulet.lore: Kael'thrax shed the metal that forms this amulet. It remembers the dragon's heartbeat.

arcane_ring_epic.name: Arcane Ring
arcane_ring_epic.lore: The ring was created to channel the power of the arcane wells. The wells are dry now.

vampiric_fang.name: Vampiric Fang
vampiric_fang.lore: Pulled from the mouth of the Vampire King. It still bites.

bonecrusher.name: Bonecrusher
bonecrusher.description: Dent the thickest plate like paper.
bonecrusher.lore: The weapon of the Oathbreaker. Sir Kaelan used it to shatter the kingdom's defenses.

thornmail_relic.name: Thornmail
thornmail_relic.description: Pain flows backward through the blade.
thornmail_relic.lore: Woven from the thorns of the World Tree. Every wound inflicted returns to the attacker.

shadowstep_boots.name: Shadowstep Boots
shadowstep_boots.lore: The assassin's guild prized these above all else. They allow you to step between darkness.

berserkers_mark.name: Berserker's Mark
berserkers_mark.description: The last thing they see is red.
berserkers_mark.lore: Carved into the flesh of Valdris's berserkers. It drives them to frenzy. It drives them to ruin.

blighted_talisman.name: Blighted Talisman
blighted_talisman.lore: A holy relic corrupted by the dragon's breath. The faith it once held became poison.

dragon_heart.name: Dragon Heart
dragon_heart.lore: The heart of a dragon does not stop when the body dies. It beats for centuries. It burns forever.

mages_insight.name: Mage's Insight
mages_insight.description: Channels the memories of a dead archmage.
mages_insight.lore: The last Archmage poured her consciousness into this ring before sealing the darkness. She is still in there.

tome_of_wisdom.name: Tome of Wisdom
tome_of_wisdom.lore: Written by the Sage King. He knew everything except how to save his kingdom.

lucky_ring.name: Lucky Ring
lucky_ring.lore: The gambler who wore it won every game. He lost the only game that mattered.

wardens_aegis.name: Warden's Aegis
wardens_aegis.lore: The Warden held the inner sanctum alone. He lasted three days. The dragon lasted four.

assassins_cloak.name: Assassin's Cloak
assassins_cloak.lore: The Guild Master's cloak. He completed every contract. His last contract was his own death.

reapers_gift.name: Reaper's Gift
reapers_gift.lore: The god of death left this behind. He does not need it. He takes directly.

crown_of_the_fallen.name: Crown of the Fallen
crown_of_the_fallen.description: Every king who wore it fell.
crown_of_the_fallen.lore: The crown of Valdris. Three kings wore it. Three kings fell. The crown endures.

heart_of_the_dragon.name: Heart of the Dragon
heart_of_the_dragon.description: The dragon's heart refuses to die.
heart_of_the_dragon.lore: Kael'thrax's true heart. It was torn from his chest by the First King. It still burns with dragonfire.

archmages_focus.name: Archmage's Focus
archmages_focus.lore: The crystallized will of the last Archmage. Her thoughts still echo within. They are not always sane.

reapers_scythe.name: Reaper's Scythe
reapers_scythe.description: Death takes, and takes, and takes.
reapers_scythe.lore: The god of death forged this scythe to reap the dragon. He failed. He does not speak of it.

aegis_of_ages.name: Aegis of Ages
aegis_of_ages.lore: The shield of the First King. It has never been broken. The First King was broken instead.

boots_of_swiftness.name: Boots of Swiftness
boots_of_swiftness.lore: Crafted from the threads of fate itself. The wearer exists slightly ahead of the present.

soulchain_amulet.name: Soulchain Amulet
soulchain_amulet.description: Bound to something ancient and hungry.
soulchain_amulet.lore: Forged to chain a demon lord. The demon is still inside. It is always hungry.

void_talisman.name: Void Talisman
void_talisman.lore: A tear in reality, sealed and worn as jewelry. The void beyond whispers. It always whispers.

mask_of_madness.name: Mask of Madness
mask_of_madness.description: The face behind it is no longer yours.
mask_of_madness.lore: Worn by the court jester who saw the dragon coming. He laughed. He was the only one who knew.

loot_bag_common.name: Common Loot Bag
loot_bag_common.description: A rough burlap sack. Something rattles inside.

loot_bag_rare.name: Rare Loot Bag
loot_bag_rare.description: A reinforced leather pouch. It glows faintly.

loot_bag_epic.name: Epic Loot Bag
loot_bag_epic.description: A velvet sack sealed with arcane wax. Power pulses within.

loot_bag_legendary.name: Legendary Loot Bag
loot_bag_legendary.description: A golden chest pouch bound in dragonhide. It hums with ancient energy.

loot_bag_mythic.name: Mythic Loot Bag
loot_bag_mythic.description: A crystalline container that defies physics. Reality bends around it.
